name: DayMate
description: AI-powered Telegram agent for morning news briefings and instant bill splitting
author: Harshavardhan

triggers.name: morning_briefing
triggers.description: Send personalised news briefing to all users every morning at 8am

triggers.name: telegram_listener
triggers.description: Listen for user messages and photo uploads on Telegram

capabilities: Fetch and summarise personalised news using NewsAPI + Groq AI
Read restaurant bill photos using vision AI
Split bills fairly between any number of people
Schedule and deliver automated morning briefings
